pkgmetadata.longdescription: jismesh - 1( 80km) 1- 40( 40km) 40000- 20( 20km) 20000- 16( 16km) 16000- 2( 10km) 2- 8( 8km) 8000- 5( 5km) 5000- 4( 4km) 4000- 2.5( 2.5km) 2500- 2( 2km) 2000- 3( 1km) 3- 4( 500m) 4- 5( 250m) 5- 6( 125m) 6 bashpip install jismesh pythonimport jismesh.utils as ju meshcode ju.to_meshcode(35.658581, 139.745433, 3)print(meshcode)53393599 pandas DataFrameimport pandas as pddf pd.DataFrame({lat [35.658581, 34.987574], lon[139.745433, 135.759363]})print(df) lat lon0 35.658581 139.7454331 34.987574 135.759363df[meshcode] ju.to_meshcode(df.lat, df.lon, 3)print(df) lat lon meshcode0 35.658581 139.745433 533935991 34.987574 135.759363 52353680 pythonimport jismesh.utils as ju meshlevel ju.to_meshlevel(53393599)print(meshlevel)3 pandas DataFrameimport pandas as pddf pd.DataFrame({meshcode [53393599, 52353680]})print(df) meshcode0 533935991 52353680df[level] ju.to_meshlevel(df.meshcode)print(df) meshcode level0 53393599 31 52353680 3 ()()() pythonimport jismesh.utils as ju lat_sw, lon_sw ju.to_meshpoint(53393599, 0, 0)print(lat_sw, lon_sw)35.6583333333 139.7375 lat_ne, lon_ne ju.to_meshpoint(53393599, 1, 1)print(lat_ne, lon_ne)35.6666666667 139.75 lat_c, lon_c ju.to_meshpoint(53393599, 0.5, 0.5)print(lat_c, lon_c)35.6625 139.74375 lat_east_neighbor_c, lon_east_neighbor_c ju.to_meshpoint(53393599, 0.5, 1.5)print(lat_east_neighbor_c, lon_east_neighbor_c)35.6625 139.75625 pandas DataFrameimport pandas as pddf pd.DataFrame({meshcode [53393599, 52353680]})print(df) meshcode0 533935991 52353680df[lat], df[lon] ju.to_meshpoint(df.meshcode, lat_multiplier0.5, lon_multiplier0.5) print(df) meshcode lat lon0 53393599 35.6625 139.743751 52353680 34.9875 135.75625 pythonimport jismesh.utils as ju generator_intersects ju.to_intersects(53394611, 4)for meshcode in generator_intersectsprint(meshcode)533946111533946112533946113533946114 TIPSlrupythonimport jismesh.utils as jufrom functools import lru_cache lrutimeit ju.to_meshcode(35.6625, 139.75625, 3)12.6 s 908 ns per loop (mean std. dev. of 7 runs, 100000 loops each) lrucached_to_meshcode lru_cache(10)(ju.to_meshcode)timeit cached_to_meshcode(35.6625, 139.75625, 3)192 ns 3.5 ns per loop (mean std. dev. of 7 runs, 10000000 loops each)
